<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Rumeylika — Dijital İllüstrasyon</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Caveat:wght@500;600;700&family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,400;0,9..144,500;1,9..144,400&family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --cream:        #f4efdf;
    --cream-deep:   #ece3c9;
    --sage:         #a9c39a;
    --sage-deep:    #7e9a6c;
    --olive:        #8b9b54;
    --mustard:      #cdbd6a;
    --terracotta:   #c46b4a;
    --berry:        #b5563e;
    --ink:          #3c3526;
    --ink-soft:     #6b6450;
    --line:         rgba(60,53,38,0.14);
  }
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    background:var(--cream);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}

  /* ---------- texture ---------- */
  .paper-texture{
    position:fixed; inset:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:1; opacity:0.5; mix-blend-mode:multiply;
    background-image:
      radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(139,155,84,0.05) 0%, transparent 45%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, rgba(196,107,74,0.05) 0%, transparent 45%);
  }

  /* ---------- NAV ---------- */
  nav{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:100;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:26px 56px;
    background:rgba(244,239,223,0.88);
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .logo{
    font-family:'Caveat',cursive;
    font-size:34px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--berry);
    letter-spacing:0.5px;
  }
  .nav-links{display:flex; gap:40px; font-size:15px; letter-spacing:0.3px; font-weight:500; color:var(--ink-soft);}
  .nav-links a{position:relative; padding-bottom:6px; transition:color .25s;}
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--ink);}
  .nav-links a.active{color:var(--ink);}
  .nav-links a.active::after{
    content:'〜'; position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:-4px; text-align:center;
    color:var(--terracotta); font-size:14px;
  }

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    min-height:100vh;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    padding:140px 56px 80px;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg{
    position:absolute; inset:0; z-index:0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 600px 500px at 85% 20%, rgba(169,195,154,0.45), transparent),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 700px 600px at 10% 85%, rgba(205,189,106,0.35), transparent),
      var(--cream);
  }
  .hero-bg svg{position:absolute; bottom:-2px; left:0; width:100%; height:auto;}
  .hero-content{position:relative; z-index:2; max-width:680px;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-size:14px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--sage-deep); margin-bottom:20px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; font-weight:600;
  }
  .eyebrow .dot{width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--terracotta); display:inline-block;}
  .hero h1{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-weight:400;
    font-size:clamp(52px,8vw,98px);
    line-height:0.98;
    color:var(--ink);
    letter-spacing:-1px;
  }
  .hero h1 .script{
    font-family:'Caveat',cursive;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--berry);
    font-size:1.15em;
    display:inline-block;
    transform:rotate(-2deg);
  }
  .hero p.sub{
    margin-top:24px;
    max-width:460px;
    font-size:17px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    line-height:1.75;
    font-weight:400;
  }
  .hero-ctas{margin-top:36px; display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:center;}
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--terracotta); color:var(--cream); padding:14px 32px; border-radius:30px;
    font-size:14px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.5px; transition:all .25s;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(196,107,74,0.3);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--berry); transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .btn-text{font-size:14px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink-soft); border-bottom:1px solid var(--ink-soft); padding-bottom:2px;}

  .hero-deco{
    position:absolute; right:6%; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
    width:340px; height:340px; z-index:1;
  }

  /* ---------- SECTION SHARED ---------- */
  section{padding:110px 56px; position:relative; z-index:2;}
  .section-head{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline; margin-bottom:60px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:16px;}
  .section-head h2{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:400;
    font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,52px); color:var(--ink);
  }
  .section-head h2 .script{font-family:'Caveat',cursive; font-weight:700; color:var(--terracotta); font-size:1.05em;}
  .section-head .count{font-size:13px; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); font-weight:500;}

  /* ---------- GALLERY ---------- */
  .gallery{background:var(--cream-deep);}
  .grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    gap:26px;
  }
  .tile{
    position:relative;
    aspect-ratio:4/5;
    border-radius:14px;
    overflow:hidden;
    cursor:pointer;
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(60,53,38,0.08);
    transition:transform .35s ease, box-shadow .35s ease;
  }
  .tile:hover{transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:0 16px 32px rgba(60,53,38,0.15);}
  .tile .art{
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    width:100%; height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    transition:transform .5s ease;
  }
  .tile:hover .art{transform:scale(1.06);}
  .tile .overlay{
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(60,53,38,0.55) 0%, transparent 50%);
    opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s ease;
    display:flex; align-items:flex-end; padding:20px;
  }
  .tile:hover .overlay{opacity:1;}
  .tile .label{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-style:italic; font-size:22px; color:#fff;
  }
  .tile .num{
    position:absolute; top:16px; right:16px; font-size:12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); letter-spacing:1px;
    background:rgba(60,53,38,0.3); padding:3px 9px; border-radius:20px;
  }

  /* ---------- ABOUT ---------- */
  .about{
    background:var(--cream);
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:0.85fr 1.15fr;
    gap:70px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .about-visual{
    aspect-ratio:1/1.05;
    border-radius:20px;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    background:linear-gradient(150deg,#e8ddb0 0%, #a9c39a 50%, #7e9a6c 100%);
    box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(60,53,38,0.15);
  }
  .about-visual::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at 75% 25%, rgba(196,107,74,0.15), transparent 50%),
               radial-gradient(circle at 25% 80%, rgba(205,189,106,0.12), transparent 55%);
    z-index:1;
  }
  .about-visual .frame{
    position:absolute; inset:24px; border:2px solid rgba(244,239,223,0.6); border-radius:10px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none;
  }
  .about-text .eyebrow{margin-bottom:18px;}
  .about-text h2{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:400;
    font-size:clamp(32px,4.2vw,46px); margin-bottom:26px; line-height:1.18; color:var(--ink);
  }
  .about-text h2 .script{font-family:'Caveat',cursive; font-weight:700; color:var(--berry); font-size:1.1em;}
  .about-text p{
    font-size:16px; line-height:1.85; color:var(--ink-soft); font-weight:400; max-width:480px; margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .stats{display:flex; gap:50px; margin-top:36px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .stat-num{font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:500; font-size:36px; color:var(--terracotta);}
  .stat-label{font-size:12px; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:4px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:600;}

  /* ---------- FOOTER ---------- */
  footer{
    background:var(--ink);
    color:var(--cream);
    padding:100px 56px 50px;
    text-align:center;
  }
  footer h2{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:400;
    font-size:clamp(34px,5.5vw,64px);
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  footer h2 .script{font-family:'Caveat',cursive; font-weight:700; color:var(--mustard); font-size:1.1em;}
  footer p{color:rgba(244,239,223,0.65); font-size:15px; margin:18px 0 40px;}
  .cta-group{display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:16px; margin-top:8px;}
  .cta-btn{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:10px;
    padding:16px 42px; border-radius:30px;
    background:var(--terracotta);
    font-size:14px; letter-spacing:0.5px; font-weight:600;
    transition:all .3s ease;
    min-width:320px;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .cta-btn:hover{background:var(--mustard); color:var(--ink);}
  .cta-btn svg{width:18px; height:18px; flex-shrink:0;}
  .footer-bottom{
    margin-top:80px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:12px;
    color:rgba(244,239,223,0.5); flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; border-top:1px solid rgba(244,239,223,0.15); padding-top:24px;
  }

  @media(max-width:900px){
    nav{padding:20px 24px;}
    .nav-links{gap:20px; font-size:13px;}
    section{padding:80px 24px;}
    .hero{padding:120px 24px 60px;}
    .hero-deco{display:none;}
    .grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .about{grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:40px;}
  }
  @media(max-width:560px){
    .nav-links{display:none;}
    .grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .cta-btn{min-width:0; width:100%; max-width:320px; padding:14px 18px; font-size:12px; white-space:normal;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="paper-texture"></div>

<nav>
  <div class="logo">rumeylika</div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#home" class="active">Home</a>
    <a href="#gallery">Illustrations</a>
    <a href="#about">About</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-bg">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 200" preserveAspectRatio="none">
      <path d="M0,120 Q120,60 260,110 T520,90 T780,120 T1040,80 T1300,110 T1440,90 L1440,200 L0,200 Z" fill="#a9c39a" opacity="0.55"/>
      <path d="M0,150 Q150,100 300,140 T600,120 T900,150 T1200,110 T1440,130 L1440,200 L0,200 Z" fill="#7e9a6c" opacity="0.45"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span>dijital illüstrasyon &amp; masalsı sanat</div>
    <h1>Art by<br><span class="script">Rumeylika</span></h1>
    <p class="sub">Bir tasarımcının kaleminden,dijital bir masal...</p>
    <div class="hero-ctas">
      <a href="#gallery" class="btn-primary">Galeriyi Gez</a>
      <a href="#about" class="btn-text">Hikâyemi Oku</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- YENİ: sağ taraf görseli -->
  <div class="hero-deco">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 340 400" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <!-- Arka hale -->
      <ellipse cx="170" cy="200" rx="140" ry="140" fill="#cdbd6a" opacity="0.18"/>

      <!-- Palet gövdesi -->
      <ellipse cx="170" cy="210" rx="130" ry="100" fill="#c8873a"/>
      <ellipse cx="170" cy="216" rx="115" ry="86" fill="#e0a855"/>

      <!-- Ahşap doku -->
      <path d="M60,195 Q100,175 140,192 Q180,208 220,192 Q260,175 285,195" fill="none" stroke="#b87828" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.45"/>
      <path d="M64,218 Q106,200 148,216 Q184,230 224,216 Q264,200 282,218" fill="none" stroke="#b87828" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.35"/>

      <!-- Parmak deliği -->
      <ellipse cx="90" cy="165" rx="22" ry="16" fill="#9c5e22"/>
      <ellipse cx="90" cy="165" rx="15" ry="10" fill="#6b3e12"/>

      <!-- Fırçalar -->
      <g transform="rotate(-25, 240, 330)">
        <rect x="234" y="265" width="7" height="90" rx="3.5" fill="#8B4513"/>
        <rect x="234" y="260" width="7" height="14" rx="3" fill="#b8860b"/>
        <ellipse cx="237.5" cy="258" rx="4.5" ry="8" fill="#1a1a3e"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="rotate(-12, 254, 325)">
        <rect x="248" y="258" width="6" height="85" rx="3" fill="#a0522d"/>
        <rect x="248" y="253" width="6" height="13" rx="2.5" fill="#cd853f"/>
        <ellipse cx="251" cy="252" rx="4" ry="7" fill="#2d4a1e"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="rotate(4, 268, 320)">
        <rect x="262" y="250" width="6" height="88" rx="3" fill="#7a4520"/>
        <rect x="262" y="245" width="6" height="13" rx="2.5" fill="#daa520"/>
        <ellipse cx="265" cy="244" rx="4" ry="7" fill="#8b0000"/>
      </g>

      <!-- Boya lekeleri -->
      <ellipse cx="148" cy="178" rx="22" ry="16" fill="#c46b4a" opacity="0.9"/>
      <ellipse cx="155" cy="174" rx="9" ry="6" fill="#d4836a" opacity="0.55"/>

      <ellipse cx="205" cy="174" rx="20" ry="14" fill="#cdbd6a" opacity="0.9"/>
      <ellipse cx="211" cy="170" rx="8" ry="5" fill="#ddd08a" opacity="0.55"/>

      <ellipse cx="175" cy="238" rx="24" ry="14" fill="#e8ddb0" opacity="0.95"/>
      <ellipse cx="181" cy="233" rx="10" ry="6" fill="#f4f0d4" opacity="0.7"/>

      <ellipse cx="128" cy="232" rx="18" ry="13" fill="#f4efdf" opacity="0.95"/>

      <ellipse cx="222" cy="228" rx="16" ry="11" fill="#4a7ab5" opacity="0.65"/>
      <ellipse cx="130" cy="195" rx="13" ry="10" fill="#8fbc8f" opacity="0.7"/>

      <!-- Kenar -->
      <ellipse cx="170" cy="210" rx="130" ry="100" fill="none" stroke="#9c6020" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>

      <!-- Gölge -->
      <ellipse cx="172" cy="328" rx="115" ry="14" fill="#8a7040" opacity="0.15"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="gallery" id="gallery">
  <div class="section-head">
    <h2>Illustrations <span class="script">galerisi</span></h2>
    <div class="count">Eserlerim</div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid">
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mantar Köyü" loading="lazy"><div class="num">01</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Mantar Köyü</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Uyuyan Tilki" loading="lazy"><div class="num">02</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Uyuyan Tilki</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kış Akşamı" loading="lazy"><div class="num">03</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Kış Akşamı</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Pembe Ev" loading="lazy"><div class="num">04</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Pembe Ev</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Duvar Boyası" loading="lazy"><div class="num">05</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Duvar Boyası</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Küçük Astronot" loading="lazy"><div class="num">06</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Küçük Astronot</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sıcak Simitler" loading="lazy"><div class="num">07</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Sıcak Simitler</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Şarkı Söyleyen Kız" loading="lazy"><div class="num">08</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Şarkı Söyleyen Kız</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kuzu ile Sohbet" loading="lazy"><div class="num">09</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Kuzu ile Sohbet</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Türk Bayraklı Yürüyüş" loading="lazy"><div class="num">10</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">Türk Bayraklı Yürüyüş</div></div></div>
    <div class="tile"><img class="art" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="iPad'de Çizim" loading="lazy"><div class="num">11</div><div class="overlay"><div class="label">iPad'de Çizim</div></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-visual"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rumeylika illüstrasyon" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;position:absolute;inset:0;"><div class="frame"></div></div>
  <div class="about-text">
    <div class="eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span>sanatçı hakkında</div>
    <h2>Her çizim, küçük<br>bir <span class="script">masalın</span> başlangıcı.</h2>
    <p>Merhaba, ben Rumeylika. Dijital illüstrasyon dünyasında, sıcak pastel tonlar ve masalsı karakterlerle çalışan bir sanatçıyım. İlham kaynağım doğa, çocukluk anıları ve gündelik hayatın küçük, kıymetli anları.</p>
    <div class="stats">
      <div><div class="stat-num">70+</div><div class="stat-label">Eser</div></div>
      <div><div class="stat-num">5</div><div class="stat-label">Yıl Deneyim</div></div>
      <div><div class="stat-num">10+</div><div class="stat-label">Özel Sipariş</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <h2>Birlikte bir <span class="script">masal</span> yazalım</h2>
  <p>İşbirliği, özel sipariş için</p>
  <div class="cta-group">
    <a href="mailto:Koksalrumeysa.98@gmail.com" class="cta-btn">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"></rect><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"></path></svg>
      E-Mail
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/rumeylika/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="cta-btn">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5" ry="5"></rect><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"></path><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"></line></svg>
      rumeylika
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">
    <span>© 2026 Rumeylika</span>
    <span>Instagram</span>
  </div>
</footer>

</body>
</html>## Hi there 👋

<!--
**Rumeylika/Rumeylika** is a ✨ _special_ ✨ repository because its `README.md` (this file) appears on your GitHub profile.

Here are some ideas to get you started:

- 🔭 I’m currently working on ...
- 🌱 I’m currently learning ...
- 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on ...
- 🤔 I’m looking for help with ...
- 💬 Ask me about ...
- 📫 How to reach me: ...
- 😄 Pronouns: ...
- ⚡ Fun fact: ...
-->
